item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
printf '%s\\n' 'ENTRIES'
find \""'$root" -mindepth 1 -print | sort
printf '"'%s\\n' 'FILES'
find \""'$root" -type f -print | sort
printf '"'%s\\n' 'UNREQUESTED_FILES'
find \""'$root" -type f ! -path "$root/config/onboarding.json" ! -path "$root/docs/onboarding.md" -print | sort'

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
printf '%s\\n' 'ENTRIES'

printf '"'%s\\n' 'FILES'
find \""'$root" -type f -print | sort
printf '"'%s\\n' 'UNREQUESTED_FILES'
find \""'$root" -type f ! -path "$root/config/onboarding.json" ! -path "$root/docs/onboarding.md" -print | sort'
